posts.title: How to Tune CPU FAN Speed With PWM on Armbian (cooling-levels based on Temperature)
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Tune Armbian’s PWM fan curve using a Device Tree Overlay. This step-by-step guide shows how to locate the pwm-fan node, edit cooling-levels and temp-trips, compile a .dtbo overlay, enable it in armbianEnv.txt, and verify fan speed changes in Linux

posts.title: How to Back Up an SD Card (Full OS Image) to an IMG File Using Linux Command Line
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Create a complete SD card backup image (.img or .img.gz) on Linux using command line tools. Restore the image anytime to recover an OS and all installed software if the card gets corrupted.

posts.title: How to Install Home Assistant and Connect to WIFI on Raspberry PI
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: In this article we will look into how we can install Home Assistant OS and connect it to the Wifi on boot up.
